ShortDescription.Value: Unofficial continuation of Hard Mode with repaired economy difficulty and building demolition costs.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Hard Mode Continued Unofficial continuation and compatibility fix of JadHajjar's Hard Mode mod.
Original project: https://github.com/JadHajjar/HardMode Original author: JadHajjar License: MIT
Maintained continuation source: https://github.com/Capili81/HardModeContinued
## Features * 4 difficulty settings in the mod's options. * Subsidies' formula is completely reworked, you get money at the start and lose subsidies the bigger your city is. You get less money, for a lower period of time the higher the difficulty setting is. * Milestone rewards use static money values based on the difficulty setting, instead of scaling up the higher you go. * Income and expense factors are re-balanced and are affected by the difficulty setting. This includes changes to taxation, exported electricity, water, goods, garbage fees, etc. * Bulldozing a building costs money based on evicted residents, land value, and building size. Costs are shown in the bulldozer tooltip and subtracted immediately when a building is demolished.
## Difficulty details The mod first rebalances individual income and expense categories, then applies the selected difficulty.
* Easy: income receives the strongest bonus, expenses are reduced to 85%, milestone rewards are 125,000 or 250,000 on every fourth milestone, and building demolition costs are divided by 6. * Medium: income receives a medium bonus, expenses are reduced to 90%, milestone rewards are 100,000 or 200,000 on every fourth milestone, and building demolition costs are divided by 4. * Hard: income receives only a small bonus, expenses use the full rebalanced value, milestone rewards are 50,000 or 100,000 on every fourth milestone, and building demolition costs are divided by 2.5. * Good Luck: income receives no difficulty bonus, expenses are increased to 110%, regular milestone rewards are removed, and building demolition costs are charged at full value. * Final milestone: milestone 20 still grants 1,000,000 on all difficulties.
## Current limitations * Road, path, rail, pipe, cable, and other network demolitions do not currently charge demolition costs. * The public options are intentionally kept simple while compatibility with current game versions is tested.
## Compatibility * Tested on Cities: Skylines II 1.6.0f1. * Do not use together with the original Hard Mode mod. * This continuation is intended to replace the original Hard Mode mod. * May conflict with other economy overhaul mods.
## Planned Features There are no immediate promises for new features. Road/network demolition costs may be considered later if they can be implemented reliably.
Publish.ChangeLog: # v1.2.5 ## Metadata-only compatibility and link refresh * Published a new metadata-only version so Paradox Mods and Skyve show a visible update reason after Cities: Skylines II 1.6.0f1. * Updated public compatibility metadata to 1.6.* and the public description to Cities: Skylines II 1.6.0f1. * Added the maintained public GitHub source link to the description: https://github.com/Capili81/HardModeContinued * No code, gameplay, economy balance, or demolition-cost behavior changes were made in this release.
